title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
